zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde von Bayern於1313年6月21日出生在可特格希 貝也時，她的父親Ludwig IV von Bayern31歲，母親Beatrix von Silesia23歲。她於1328年5月28日與Friedrich II von Sachsen在德國貝也纽伦堡結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1346年7月2日在德國薩辛可萊斯 梅斯享年33歲，埋葬在薩辛阿赤 諾森諾森。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde von Bayern于1313年6月21日出生在可特格希 貝也时，她的父亲Ludwig IV von Bayern31岁，母亲Beatrix von Silesia23岁。她于1328年5月28日与Friedrich II von Sachsen在德国貝也纽伦堡结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1346年7月2日在德国薩辛可萊斯 梅斯享年33岁，埋葬在薩辛阿赤 諾森諾森。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Bayern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German (and possibly also Dutch)   Bayer   or   Beyers  , or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. Compare   Byers  .

variants.name: Bayer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Kurt, Otto, Klaus, Manfred, Bernd, Bernhard, Erwin, Franz, Hans, Johann, Juergen.

German, Scandinavian, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Bavaria (German Bayern). This region of southern Germany derives its name from that of the Celtic tribe of the Boii who once inhabited this area. They were displaced in the 6th century AD by an ancient Germanic people, the Boioarii or Baiuarii, whose name is derived from that of their Celtic predecessors. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, Czechia, Slovakia, and Poland. Compare Beyer and Payer .

English (Lincolnshire): occupational name for a maker of baize cloth, from an agent derivative of Old French baies, Middle English bayes (from the adjective bai ‘reddish-brown, bay’), probably so called because of its original color. This material was said to have been introduced into Britain by immigrants from France and the Netherlands in the 16th century, but the word certainly appears much earlier in English. The surname may also be topographic denoting a ‘dweller by the bend’, from an agent derivative of Old English bēag ‘bend’.

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde von Bayern was born on 21 June 1313, in Bavaria, her father, Ludwig IV von Bayern, was 31 and her mother, Beatrix von Silesia, was 23. She married Friedrich II von Sachsen on 28 May 1328, in Nuremberg, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 2 July 1346, in Meißen, Saxony, Germany, at the age of 33, and was buried in Nossen, Amt Nossen, Saxony.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde von Bayern est née le 21 juin 1313, à Königreich Bayern, son père, Ludwig IV von Bayern, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Beatrix von Silesia, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Friedrich II von Sachsen le 28 mai 1328, à Nürnberg, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 juillet 1346, à Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterrée à Nossen, Amt Nossen, Sachsen.

de.Eisenach, Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Thüri: Eisenach, Kreis Eisenacher, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde von Bayern am 21. Juni 1313 in Königreich Bayern geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ludwig IV von Bayern 31 und ihre Mutter Beatrix von Silesia 23. Sie hat am 28. Mai 1328 in Nürnberg, Bayern, Deutschland Friedrich II von Sachsen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Juli 1346 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Deutschland und wurde in Nossen, Amt Nossen, Sachsen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde von Bayern è nata il il 21 giugno 1313 nel Königreich Bayern, sua padre, Ludwig IV von Bayern, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Beatrix von Silesia, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Friedrich II von Sachsen il 28 maggio 1328, nel Nürnberg, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 2 luglio 1346, nel Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Germania, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolta a Nossen, Amt Nossen, Sachsen.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde von Bayernが1313年6月21日にクoニグレイチ バイエルンで生まれた時，父Ludwig IV von Bayernは31歳，母Beatrix von Silesiaは23歳であった。1328年5月28日にドイツバイエルンンuルンバーグでFriedrich II von Sachsenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1346年7月2日にドイツサチセンクレイス メイssンで33歳で死去し，サチセンアムト ノセンノセンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde von Bayern(이)가 1313년 6월 21일 ko니그레이치 베이른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ludwig IV von Bayern(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix von Silesia(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1328년 5월 28일 독일 베이른 뉘른베르크에서 Friedrich II von Sachsen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1346년 7월 2일 독일 작센 크레이스 이ss에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 작센 아트 노센 노센에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde von Bayern nasceu em 21 de junho de 1313, em Königreich Bayern, seu pai, Ludwig IV von Bayern, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix von Silesia, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Friedrich II von Sachsen em 28 de maio de 1328, em Nürnberg, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de julho de 1346, em Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemanha, com 33 anos, e foi sepultada em Nossen, Amt Nossen, Sachsen.

ru.Eisenach, Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Thüri: аисенач, крис аисеначир, гроssхирзогтум сачсен-вимар-исенач, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde von Bayern родилась 21 июня 1313 г. в местности кoниграич беиирн, её отцу по имени Ludwig IV von Bayern было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Beatrix von Silesia, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Friedrich II von Sachsen 28 мая 1328 г. в местности Нюрнберг, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 2 июля 1346 г. в местности крис миssен, сачсен, Германия в возрасте 33 лет и была похоронена в местности носсен, амт носсен, сачсен.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde von Bayern nació el 21 de junio de 1313, en Königreich Bayern, su papá, Ludwig IV von Bayern, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Beatrix von Silesia, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Friedrich II von Sachsen el 28 de mayo de 1328, en Nürnberg, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 2 de julio de 1346, en Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemania, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultada en Nossen, Amt Nossen, Sachsen.
